isi.lyrics:
Lyric CHANYEOL (EXO) - Ocean Drive

Romanization

Driving to the ocean
Buckle up tight
buseojineun pado ttara
Revving up the motor
naeil saenggageun Stop
mami kkeuneun daero gabolkka

tteugeowojin gonggi
ttaega dwaesseo urin
hwaryeohan i dosil tteona
On the road
mwo hae eoseo Ride in
pyeolchyeojineun Palm tree
gyehoek ttawin eopseo
gabyeowojin mom

dwittaraoneun hae
soril jilleo deo keuge
uril bureuneun jeo Wave
Surf the wave

Driving to the ocean
Buckle up tight
buseojineun pado ttara
Revving up the motor
naeil saenggageun Stop
mami kkeuneun daero gabolkka

Cuz we’re young and we’re dumb
and we're dreaming
hamkkemyeon eonjena
Feel like eighteen
Dive into the ocean
till the sundown
I don’t wanna slow down
balba doro wil Ride tonight

amudena beoseodeonjyeo Sneakers
eumbit morae wireul dallyeo naga
jjaenghan taeyang arae paran bada
urin Go dive

numbusin Light challanhan Scene
chueogeun uril deo bitnaeji
mae sunggan neul You by my side
You and I you and I

Driving to the ocean
Buckle up tight
buseojineun pado ttara
Revving up the motor
naeil saenggageun Stop
mami kkeuneun daero gabolkka

Cuz we’re young and we’re dumb
and we're dreaming
hamkkemyeon eonjena
Feel like eighteen
Dive into the ocean
till the sundown
I don’t wanna slow down
balba doro wil Ride tonight

And we got no time to waste
doraoji aneul Day
Come and take my hand
Then we'll dance the night away

Driving to the ocean
Buckle up tight
buseojineun pado ttara
Revving up the motor
naeil saenggageun Stop
mami kkeuneun daero gabolkka

Cuz we’re young and we’re dumb
and we're dreaming
uriui yeohaengeun kkeuti eopji
Dive into the ocean
till the sundown
I don’t wanna slow down
gyesok ieojyeo gal Tonight

I don’t wanna slow down
gyesok ieojyeo gal Tonight

Hangeul

Driving to the ocean
Buckle up tight
부서지는 파도 따라
Revving up the motor
내일 생각은 Stop
맘이 끄는 대로 가볼까

뜨거워진 공기
때가 됐어 우린
화려한 이 도실 떠나
On the road
뭐 해 어서 Ride in
펼쳐지는 Palm tree
계획 따윈 없어
가벼워진 몸

뒤따라오는 해
소릴 질러 더 크게
우릴 부르는 저 Wave
Surf the wave

Driving to the ocean
Buckle up tight
부서지는 파도 따라
Revving up the motor
내일 생각은 Stop
맘이 끄는 대로 가볼까

Cuz we’re young and we’re dumb
and we're dreaming
함께면 언제나
Feel like eighteen
Dive into the ocean
till the sundown
I don’t wanna slow down
밟아 도로 윌 Ride tonight

아무데나 벗어던져 Sneakers
은빛 모래 위를 달려 나가
쨍한 태양 아래 파란 바다
우린 Go dive

눈부신 Light 찬란한 Scene
추억은 우릴 더 빛내지
매 순간 늘 You by my side
You and I you and I

Driving to the ocean
Buckle up tight
부서지는 파도 따라
Revving up the motor
내일 생각은 Stop
맘이 끄는 대로 가볼까

Cuz we’re young and we’re dumb
and we're dreaming
함께면 언제나
Feel like eighteen
Dive into the ocean
till the sundown
I don’t wanna slow down
밟아 도로 윌 Ride tonight

And we got no time to waste
돌아오지 않을 Day
Come and take my hand
Then we'll dance the night away

Driving to the ocean
Buckle up tight
부서지는 파도 따라
Revving up the motor
내일 생각은 Stop
맘이 끄는 대로 가볼까

Cuz we’re young and we’re dumb
and we're dreaming
우리의 여행은 끝이 없지
Dive into the ocean
till the sundown
I don’t wanna slow down
계속 이어져 갈 Tonight

I don’t wanna slow down
계속 이어져 갈 Tonight
